testcase.name: test_page_homepage_navigation

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#nav-sandbox')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for page.locator('#nav-sandbox')

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:18: in test_page_homepage_navigation page.locator("page.locator('#nav-sandbox')").click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#nav-sandbox')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - waiting for page.locator('#nav-sandbox')

testcase.name: test_page_faq_navigation

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#nav-faq')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for page.locator('#nav-faq')

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:36: in test_page_faq_navigation expect(page.locator("page.locator('#nav-faq')")).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#nav-faq')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for page.locator('#nav-faq')

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_003

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/faq/')' Actual value: https://www.scrapethissite.com/ Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "https://www.scrapethissite.com/"

testcase.failure: tests/page_1_cdbd/test_page_1_cdbd.py:31: in test_TC_Navigation_003 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"/faq/")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/faq/')' E Actual value: https://www.scrapethissite.com/ E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 8 × unexpected value "https://www.scrapethissite.com/"

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('https://gum.co/oLpqb')' Actual value: https://gumroad.com/checkout Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 3 × unexpected value "https://gumroad.com/checkout?action=show&controller=links&format=html&id=oLpqb&price=29700&product=oLpqb&referrer=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.scrapethissite.com%2Flessons%2Fsign-up%2F&referrer=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.scrapethissite.com%2Flessons%2Fsign-up%2F&rent=false&wanted=true" 4 × unexpected value "https://gumroad.com/checkout"

testcase.failure: tests/page_3_9ddb/test_page_3_9ddb.py:19: in test_TC_Navigation_01 expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"https://gum.co/oLpqb")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('https://gum.co/oLpqb')' E Actual value: https://gumroad.com/checkout E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 3 × unexpected value "https://gumroad.com/checkout?action=show&controller=links&format=html&id=oLpqb&price=29700&product=oLpqb&referrer=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.scrapethissite.com%2Flessons%2Fsign-up%2F&referrer=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.scrapethissite.com%2Flessons%2Fsign-up%2F&rent=false&wanted=true" E 4 × unexpected value "https://gumroad.com/checkout"
